## Quick Reference

```bash
${TEST_COMMAND}             # Run tests
selene ${SOURCE_DIR}        # Run linter
stylua ${SOURCE_DIR}        # Format code
stylua --check ${SOURCE_DIR} # Check formatting
```

## Working Conventions

- Tests must pass before completing any task
- Run tests at the end of every task
- All new public functions must have LuaCATS annotations (`---@param`, `---@return`)
- Plugin/ files are entry points only (≤30 lines) — logic goes in lua/
